name: Ground Beef Cheese Custard
recipeIngredient: 3 slices bread, buttered and toasted into 1-inch squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the ground beef in an 8 x 8 x 2-inch baking dish.
2. Sprinkle with salt. Bake in a 350-degree oven for 15 minutes. Drain.
3. Mix eggs, mustard, garlic, milk, and flour. Pour over hot beef.
4. Sprinkle the shredded cheese over all. Cover the top evenly with toasted bread squares.
5. Bake until the cheese custard is set, 30 to 35 minutes.
6. Serves 6.
